pyeto.description: Calcular la duración a partir del cálculo FAO56 de la biblioteca PyETO

static.description: Módulo 'de prueba' con un delta estático configurable

passthrough.description: Módulo de paso que devuelve el valor de un sensor de evapotranspiración como delta

labels.auto-calc-enabled: Cálculo automático de la duración de las zonas

automatic-duration-calculation.description: Calculation takes collected weather data up to that point and updates the bucket for each automatic zone. Then, the duration is adjusted based on the new bucket value and the collected weather data is removed.

errors.warning-update-time-on-or-after-calc-tim: Advertencia: la hora de actualización de los datos meteorológicos es igual o posterior a la hora de cálculo

automatic-update.header: Actualización automática de los datos meteorológicos
automatic-update.description: Collect and store weather data automatically. Weather data is required to calculate zone buckets and durations.

automatic-clear.description: Automatically remove collected weather data at a configured time. Use this to make sure that there is no left over weather data from previous days. Don't remove the weather data before you calculate and only use this option if you expect the automatic update to collect weather data after you calculated for the day. Ideally, you want to prune as late in the day as possible.

continuousupdates.description: This experimental feature will continuously update the sensor data. This is useful for sensor groups that use sources that provide continuous data, such as weather stations. This feature cannot be used for sensor groups that at least partly rely on weather services as continous polling of APIs will incur costs. Keep in mind that this is experimental and may not work as expected. Use at your own risk.

errors.cannot-delete-mapping-because-zones-use-: No puedes eliminar este grupo de sensores porque hay al menos una zona que lo está usando.
errors.source_does_not_exist: Source does not exist. Please enter a valid source, such as 'sensor.mysensor'.

mapping.sensor-aggregate-of-sensor-values-to-cal: de los valores de los sensores para calcular la duración

mappings.description: Añada uno o más grupos de sensores que recuperen datos meteorológicos de Weather service, de sensores o de una combinación de éstos. Puede asignar cada grupo de sensores a una o más zonas
mappings.no_items: Aún no hay grupos de sensores definidos.
mappings.title: Grupos de sensores

weather-records.title: Weather Records (Last 10)
weather-records.no-data: No weather data available for this sensor group

errors.cannot-delete-module-because-zones-use-i: No puedes eliminar este módulo porque hay al menos una zona que lo está usando.

translated-options.EstimateFromSunHoursAndTemperature: Estimate from average of sun hours and temperature

modules.description: Añada uno o varios módulos que calculen la duración del riego. Cada módulo tiene su propia configuración y puede utilizarse para calcular la duración de una o varias zonas.
modules.title: Módulos

zones.description: Especifique aquí una o varias zonas de riego. La duración del riego se calcula por zona, en función del tamaño, el rendimiento, el estado, el módulo y el grupo de sensores.
zones.title: Zonas

schedules.title: Schedules
schedules.description: Create recurring schedules to automatically calculate, update, or irrigate your zones. No automations needed.
schedules.no_items: No schedules configured yet. Click 'Add Schedule' to get started.

fields.name: Name
fields.account_for_duration: Start early so irrigation finishes at trigger time

adjustments.title: Seasonal Adjustments
adjustments.description: Apply month-based multiplier or bucket adjustments to automatically adapt irrigation for seasonal conditions.
adjustments.no_items: No seasonal adjustments configured yet. Click 'Add Adjustment' to get started.
adjustments.threshold_hint: Added to the zone bucket. Positive = more water needed, negative = less.

info.title: Info
info.description: View information about next irrigation and system status.

irrigate_now.title: Irrigate Now
irrigate_now.description: Immediately start irrigation for all zones that have a linked entity. Skip conditions are ignored.
irrigate_now.no_linked_zones: No zones have a linked switch/valve entity with a calculated duration.

coordinate_config.title: Coordenadas de Ubicación
coordinate_config.description: Configure las coordenadas de ubicación para obtener datos meteorológicos. Puede usar coordenadas manuales diferentes a la ubicación de Home Assistant si es necesario.
coordinate_config.elevation: Elevación (metros sobre el nivel del mar)

days_between_irrigation.title: Días Entre Riegos
days_between_irrigation.description:
Configure el número mínimo de días que deben pasar entre eventos de riego. Esto ayuda a controlar la frecuencia de riego para la conservación del agua y el manejo de la salud de las plantas.

Casos de uso típicos:
• Cuidado del césped: intervalos de 1-2 días previenen el exceso de riego
• Restricciones de sequía: intervalos de 6+ días para riego semanal
• Plantas de raíces profundas: intervalos de 3-7 días para riego menos frecuente
• Conservación del agua: personalizable según el clima y las condiciones del suelo
days_between_irrigation.label: Días mínimos entre riegos
days_between_irrigation.help_text: Establezca en 0 para desactivar esta función. Se admiten valores de 1-365 días. Esta configuración funciona junto con la lógica de pronóstico de precipitación existente.

irrigation_start_triggers.title: Irrigation Start Triggers
irrigation_start_triggers.description: Configure when irrigation should start based on solar events. You can add multiple triggers for different schedules. For sunrise triggers, leaving offset at 0 will automatically use the total duration of all enabled zones.

name.name: Trigger Name
name.description: A descriptive name to identify this trigger

type.name: Trigger Type
type.description: The type of solar event to trigger on

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether this trigger is currently active

offset_minutes.name: Offset (minutes)
offset_minutes.description: Minutes before (-) or after (+) the solar event. For sunrise triggers, use 0 for automatic timing based on total zone duration.

azimuth_angle.name: Azimuth Angle (degrees)
azimuth_angle.description: Solar azimuth angle in degrees where 0=North, 90=East, 180=South, 270=West

account_for_duration.name: Account for Duration
account_for_duration.description: When enabled, irrigation will start early enough to finish at the specified time. When disabled, irrigation will start exactly at the specified time.

irrigation_start_triggers.no_triggers: No irrigation start triggers configured. The system will use the default behavior (sunrise with total zone duration). Add triggers to customize when irrigation starts.
irrigation_start_triggers.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete the trigger '{name}'?

validation.azimuth_invalid: Azimuth angle must be a valid number

help.sunrise_offset: For sunrise triggers: Use negative values to start before sunrise, positive to start after. Set to 0 to automatically start early enough to complete all zones before sunrise.
help.sunset_offset: For sunset triggers: Use negative values to start before sunset, positive to start after sunset.
help.azimuth_explanation: Solar azimuth is the compass direction of the sun. 0°=North, 90°=East, 180°=South, 270°=West. You can enter any angle value (e.g., 450° = 90°, -30° = 330°). Use this to trigger irrigation when the sun reaches a specific position.
help.multiple_triggers: You can configure multiple triggers. Each enabled trigger will independently schedule irrigation starts.

weather_skip.title: Skip Conditions
weather_skip.description: Automatically skip irrigation when conditions are unfavorable. Precipitation check requires a weather service. Temperature and wind checks also require a weather service.
weather_skip.threshold_description: Minimum amount of precipitation (in mm) forecasted for today and tomorrow to skip irrigation.
weather_skip.wind_threshold_label: Skip if wind speed is above

zone_sequencing.title: Zone Sequencing
zone_sequencing.description: When multiple zones need irrigation, choose whether they run at the same time or one after another. Sequential mode waits for each zone to finish before starting the next.
